title: Maintain wildlife habitat refuges
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain wildlife habitat refuges demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Assess the scope of the refuge maintenance job
